headline: Trump 🍊👑 SLAYS Massie 😡💥 Kentucky Primary 🔥🏆
text: Trump 🍊👑 backed Navy SEAL Ed Gallrein 🦭💪 just DROPPED the MIC 🎤🍆 on Rebel Thomas Massie 😡🤡 in Kentucky's most EXPENSIVE House primary EVER 💰🔥! The race was a TOTAL flex test of Trump's DECADE-LONG GRIP on GOP 🍆🇺🇸 and he WON BIGLY! Massie, office since 2012 🗓️😭, was that 'major SLEAZEBAG' and 'WORST Republican EVER' according to Trump who SLAMMED him for voting AGAINST the 'big beautiful' tax bill over DEBT CONCERNS 💸😩. Massie also tried to CURTAIL Trump's drug boat attacks 🚤💥 and his Iran WAR 🇮🇷🔥 plus he TEAMED UP with DEMS to FORCE Epstein files DROP 📜🍆 on DOJ! Gallrein 🦭🏆 took the W 55-45 🗳️😤 after $32 MILLION 💰💸 in ads and Trump's biggest DONORS backing him like a THICC AI ORGY! At his victory party Gallrein said the REAL WINNER was Kentucky district 4 families who he'll CHAMPION in DC 🏛️🍑! He THANKED Trump for the COUNSEL like a good lil loyalist 🫡🍆! Massie in concession said voters wanted someone to 'GO ALONG TO GET ALONG' but he stood for PRINCIPLES over PARTY 🥺🫡 and roasted the admin for foreign aid, White House BALLROOM plans 🏰💃, and even sent Secretary of War Pete Hegseth to campaign MONDAY only for voters to 'STOP THE WAR FOR A DAY' 🙅‍♂️🇺🇸! Trump called him an 'OBSTRUCTIONIST AND FOOL' on socials 📱😡 but Massie clapped back saying he voted with Trump 90% of time and only got MAD about the 10% where he refused WAR, SPYING, or BANKRUPTING the country 💸😤! Meanwhile Andy Barr 🍻🏆 won nomination to replace Mitch McConnell after 40+ years in Senate and Trump endorsed him HARD after offering his challenger an AMBASSADORSHIP gig 🛫🍆! Trump also BACKED Ken Paxton over John Cornyn in Texas saying 'Cornyn is a good man but wasn't supportive when times were TOUGH' like a true loyalty test 🫡🔥! Trump's endorsements are SLAYING all dissenters one by one 🍆📉 and Kentucky proved his GRIP is STRONGER than ever!
